status: R0.1 Stage A-R model-aware RAG config patch only. Preserves Stage A strict baseline; no model execution has been run from this config.
_scope: RAG-aware Phase 2.2 Stage A-R model-aware rerun config for EMR_AI_24clinic /explain. Uses model-specific structured-output and reasoning/no-thinking profiles; does not replace the Stage A strict baseline.
_canonical_workspace: Main PC keeps source-of-truth docs, commits, and pushes. HP Z2 is execution-only runner.
_hard_stops: Do not run this config unless the user explicitly issues Phase 2 Stage A-R heavy run GO.
Do not write to EMR_AI_24clinic source/code from this config patch.
Do not commit or push without explicit user GO.
Do not treat Stage A-R as replacing Stage A strict endpoint baseline; compare both.
Do not run Stage B top_k, Stage C prompt-tone, or chunk variation without separate GO.

_backend._note: LM Studio server URL is for the LLM backend lane. The /explain app endpoint host is runner-specific and must be supplied by the heavy-run runner.

_load_profile._note: Stage A-R keeps models loaded longer during diagnosis; runner still unloads between models for fair isolated cells. The -y CLI arg avoids interactive multiple-match prompts.

_execution_pacing._note: Future heavy-run runner should not immediately load the next model after a long load/unload. Wait for LM Studio to report no loaded models, then apply the cooldown before continuing.

_stage_policy: Stage A-R is a model-aware rerun: same 15 cases and RAG retrieval settings as Stage A, but model-specific inference profiles are enabled.
Stage A strict baseline remains the endpoint-readiness baseline. Stage A-R diagnoses whether model-aware integration can rescue format-sensitive models.
Qwen profiles use non-thinking JSON mode for concise RAG explanations.
gpt-oss profiles use structured output plus explicit reasoning effort hints.
Granite profile emphasizes RAG/extraction/instruction following with low sampling.
Gemma profile uses its documented sampling family plus JSON schema and channel/tag cleanup for diagnosis.
Use execution pacing between all models; especially after qwen3.6-35b-a3b, gemma-4-31b, and gpt-oss-120b.

models.label: hpz2-lms-qwen3-14b-rag
models._smoke_status: PASS in HP Z2 LM Studio smoke baseline

inference_options.system_suffix: Use Qwen non-thinking mode for this short RAG citation task. Output only the final JSON object. /no_think
inference_options._rationale: Qwen3 official guidance separates thinking and non-thinking modes; short JSON RAG answers should use non-thinking settings.

models.label: hpz2-lms-qwen3-8b-rag
models._smoke_status: PASS in HP Z2 LM Studio smoke baseline

inference_options.system_suffix: Use Qwen non-thinking mode for this short RAG citation task. Output only the final JSON object. /no_think
inference_options._rationale: Qwen3 official guidance separates thinking and non-thinking modes; short JSON RAG answers should use non-thinking settings.

models.label: hpz2-lms-gpt-oss-20b-rag
models._smoke_status: PASS in HP Z2 LM Studio retry baseline after non-interactive -y resolution

inference_options._rationale: gpt-oss-20b is the lower-latency local/specialized candidate; low reasoning plus schema should favor concise structured RAG output.

models.label: hpz2-lms-qwen3.6-35b-a3b-rag
models._smoke_status: PASS in HP Z2 LM Studio smoke baseline

inference_options.system_suffix: Use Qwen non-thinking mode for this short RAG citation task. Output only the final JSON object. /no_think
inference_options._rationale: Qwen3.6 is optimized for agentic/long-context work, but this RAG endpoint needs concise structured output; non-thinking JSON mode isolates its useful instruction-following ability.

models.label: hpz2-lms-granite-4.1-30b-rag
models._role: secondary 30B comparison candidate added by user request
models._smoke_status: PASS in HP Z2 LM Studio smoke baseline

inference_options._rationale: Granite 4.1 advertises RAG, QA, extraction, multilingual, and function-calling use cases; low sampling favors extraction-like citation adherence.

models.label: hpz2-lms-gemma-4-31b-rag
models._role: secondary dense quality/safety wording comparison candidate added by user request
models._smoke_status: PASS in HP Z2 LM Studio smoke baseline

inference_options.system_suffix: Do not emit thought/channel tags. Output only the final JSON object that matches the schema.
inference_options._rationale: Gemma 4 official sampling guidance uses temperature 1.0/top_p 0.95/top_k 64; schema and tag cleanup diagnose whether integration can handle its channel-style output.

models.label: hpz2-lms-gpt-oss-120b-rag
models._role: large gpt-oss comparison candidate added by user request
models._smoke_status: PASS in HP Z2 LM Studio smoke baseline; load_s about 100.666

inference_options._rationale: gpt-oss-120b is the high-reasoning quality candidate; medium reasoning preserves nuance while schema constrains the final RAG output.

version_log.change: Initial Phase 2 Stage A LM Studio config patch after HP Z2 smoke baseline and RA-03 user resolution. Config only: heavy run X / model execution X / EMR_AI_24clinic write X / commit X / push X.

Added openai/gpt-oss-120b as a Phase 2 Stage A RAG endpoint test target by user request. Removed it from hold_models; granite-4.1-30b and gemma-4-31b remain HOLD. Config only: heavy run X / model execution X / EMR_AI_24clinic write X / commit X / push X.

Added ibm/granite-4.1-30b and google/gemma-4-31b as Phase 2 Stage A RAG endpoint test targets by user request. hold_models is now empty. Added execution pacing policy: require unload/no-models status before next load, 90s default post-unload cooldown, 180s cooldown after large models or failures, and 10s post-load settle. Config only: heavy run X / model execution X / EMR_AI_24clinic write X / commit X / push X.

Bound Stage A config to tools/hpz2_lmstudio_phase2_stage_a_runner.py and corrected app_repo path relative to local-llm-eval repo root. Runner-side LM Studio adapter keeps EMR_AI_24clinic read-only. Patch/validation only: heavy run X / model execution X / EMR_AI_24clinic write X.

Added model-aware inference profiles for Stage A-R: JSON schema structured output for all models; Qwen non-thinking /no_think profile; gpt-oss reasoning hints; Granite RAG extraction profile; Gemma documented sampling + channel cleanup. New config only: model execution X / EMR_AI_24clinic source write X / commit X / push X.
